\tzpentry{ID4117}{Pi Definition}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4117 introduces Pi Definition as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
$\lceil\Pi,\phi c[s]:=sgn(\Pi(s-1)-\phi c)\in{-1,+1}$
\]
